---
title: "Paleobiology Explorer"
output: 
  html_document:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    toc_collapsed: true
    toc_depth: 2
    number_sections: true
    fig_width: 6
    fig_height: 4
    fig_caption: true
    code_folding: show
    code_download: true
    code_copy: true
    lib_dir: libs
    css: style.css
    self_contained: false
filters:
  - shinylive

---

# Paleobiology Explorer

Esta es una aplicación Shiny que te permite explorar la base de datos de Paleobiología.

:::{.column-page}
```{shinylive-r}
#| standalone: true
library(shiny)
library(ggplot2)
library(plotly)
library(jsonlite)

ui <- fluidPage(
    titlePanel("Paleobiology Database Explorer"),
    
    fluidRow(
        column(12,
            textInput("taxon", "Enter Taxon", value = ""),
            selectInput("geologic_period", "Geologic Period", 
                        choices = c("Precambrian", "Cambrian", "Ordovician", "Silurian", 
                                    "Devonian", "Carboniferous", "Permian", "Triassic", 
                                    "Jurassic", "Cretaceous", "Paleogene", "Neogene", 
                                    "Quaternary")),
            actionButton("search", "Search")
        )
    ),
    
    fluidRow(
        column(12,
            plotlyOutput("interactive_plot"),
            verbatimTextOutput("data_head")
        )
    )
)

server <- function(input, output, session) {
    observeEvent(input$search, {
        req(input$taxon, input$geologic_period)
        
        # Define the URL for the PBDB data in JSON format
        data_url <- paste0("https://paleobiodb.org/data1.2/occs/list.json?base_name=", 
                           input$taxon, "&interval=", input$geologic_period)
        
        # Download and read the data directly
        pbdb_data <- tryCatch({
            fromJSON(data_url)$records
        }, error = function(e) {
            cat("Error reading JSON data:", e$message, "\n")
            return(NULL)
        })
        
        if (is.null(pbdb_data)) {
            cat("No data to display due to error.\n")
            return(NULL)
        }
        
        cat("Data loaded with", nrow(pbdb_data), "rows\n")
        cat("Variables:", names(pbdb_data), "\n")

        output$data_head <- renderPrint({
            head(pbdb_data[, 1:4])
        })
        
        output$interactive_plot <- renderPlotly({
            # Make sure these columns exist in the dataset
            if("paleolat" %in% colnames(pbdb_data) & "paleolng" %in% colnames(pbdb_data)){
                gg <- ggplot(pbdb_data, aes(x = paleolng, y = paleolat)) +
                      geom_point(aes(color = taxon_name)) +
                      theme_minimal()
                ggplotly(gg)
            } else {
                ggplotly(ggplot() + ggtitle("No data found for this taxon"))
            }
        })
    })
}

shinyApp(ui, server)

```
:::
